source: slack-orchestrator internal/inbound.DefaultCapabilityContractV1 (offline fallback; live uses GET /v1/runtime/capability-catalog or /v1/admin/catalog)

skills.label: Create Email
skills.description: Design and send email, to one or a hundred. Bulk concurrency handled, HTML supported natively. Requires confirmation before send.

paramDefaults.to: Message author (Slack profile; makeacompany slack→email index when configured)

skills.label: Create Image
skills.description: Generate an original image from a text prompt using Anna's creative workflow.

skills.label: Create Doc
skills.description: Create Google documents, outlines, and game plans. Pair with search skills to produce research documents in seconds.

paramDefaults.title: Derived from intent when omitted; runtime infers a working title before draft
paramDefaults.editors: Message author email (implicit default); append @mentions or explicit editor emails
paramDefaults.length: Defaults to one page when omitted

skills.label: Create Company
skills.description: Start a private company channel from a name (slug); founders default to you plus @mentioned cofounders.

paramDefaults.name: Company / channel slug (gathered in-thread when not in the first message)
paramDefaults.founders: Optional; when omitted defaults to the message author plus any @mentioned cofounders

skills.label: Create Issue
skills.description: Create a company issue with a title and body from the Slack thread. New issues land in Backlog on the team board. Requires confirmation before publish.

skills.label: Delete Company
skills.description: Removes a company and sends it to the archive. Requires confirmation.

paramDefaults.name: Company / channel slug (gathered in-thread when not in the first message)

skills.label: Read Company
skills.description: Summarize the latest activity within the company.

skills.label: Read Web
skills.description: Search the public web (internet) for current events and external references.

skills.label: Read Skills
skills.description: Display the skills of the team

skills.label: Read Twitter
skills.description: Search twitter for high-impression tweets on any topic

skills.label: Update Terms
skills.description: Show platform terms of use for users to agree (or not). Automatically recorded

skills.label: Update Issue
skills.description: Update a company issue, including the title, body, or status.  Requires confirmation before write.

paramDefaults.status: Match an existing Project Status option (for example Backlog, In Progress, Done)
